observations.detail: lib/run-agent.sh uses eval to pass AUTO_FLAG to claude CLI. AUTO_FLAG is only set from --auto argument, not user input, so injection risk is minimal but worth documenting.
136 placeholder tokens across 7 templates. As client count grows, a placeholder miss report after each training-builder run would reduce delivery QA time.
No agents/gtm-deploy.md yet — Full GTM Deployment (Step 5 on value ladder) has no agent playbook. High-value to build next.
136 placeholder tokens across 7 templates — training-builder must replace all of them from client config. High-risk area for incomplete output.
Placeholder miss rate will be the #1 source of delivery quality issues. Mitigation: delivery-packager quality check already scans for '{{' in outputs.
expert-series.md references sibling repo path '../expert-series-v3/' — path validation missing from agent
Add path existence check to expert-series.md Phase 1 before attempting to use sibling repo
6 new agent playbooks added: automation-mapper, contract-generator, integrator-onboarding, 30-day-checkpoint, roi-report, client-slack-setup. All Framework P1/P2 gaps now covered.
Orchestrator updated with upsell detection logic (5 signals), auto-trigger queue, and full time-based pipeline triggers. Smart orchestration now active.
AGI-1 healing patterns updated with 10 new patterns covering all new agents. Patterns cover Slack token failures, contract tier missing, checkpoint timing, ROI data quality gate, and upsell cooldown.
state/case-studies/ directory referenced by roi-report.md but not yet created. Need to mkdir and add candidates.json stub.
state/orchestrator/upsell-log.json referenced by orchestrator.md but stub file not yet created. Orchestrator will fail to read it on first run.
Create state stubs for upsell-log.json and case-studies/candidates.json to prevent first-run errors.
client-slack-setup.md originally referenced project.json for Justin's Slack user ID. Corrected to use SLACK_JUSTIN_USER_ID env var — keeps credentials out of committed config files.

hypotheses.hypothesis: The most common first failure point will be SLACK_BOT_TOKEN missing — client-slack-setup is the first auto-triggered new agent and most setups won't have Slack configured immediately.
The 30-day checkpoint email response rate will be <50% without a follow-up sequence. Consider adding a 3-day follow-up if no response.
ROI report with no check-in data will use conservative 70% reduction estimate — real data will almost always show higher savings. Track delta to validate estimate accuracy.
